- Relationship shifts — some close friends couldn’t handle the transition while others stayed supportive; now her relationships feel more genuine. (12:09 am on 13 Sept 2023)

- Emotional and bodily exploration — art helped her process changes in her body and identity; she created paintings and a stained-glass window expressing her journey. (2:24 pm on 14 Aug 2023; 1:33 pm on 25 Aug 2023)

Overall: Caroline experienced both losses and gains — losing some relationships but gaining deeper, authentic connections, stronger community ties, new advocacy and mentorship roles, a clearer career direction, and greater self-acceptance expressed through art and public work.
